chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition No.D-189 of 2023. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.972/2023. 2. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 3. For orders on M.A No.907/2023. 4. After addressing the Court at some length, learned counsel for the petitioners do not press the instant petition; it is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE
